title: rosa × dumetorum decalvata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum decalvata, also known as the Rosa dumetorum var. decalvata, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a variant of the Rosa dumetorum species. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum decalvata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Rosa × dumetorum decalvata is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
